@sigil v0 hybrid
G: webhook_skew_fix
C: abs(now-ts)>"300" ∧ returns("401") ∧ edge_valid_rejected
P: widen_tolerance ∧ allow_provider_skew ∧ keep_401_on_expiry
V: edge(-299s_200) ∧ edge(301s_401) ∧ no_regression
A: adjust_skew_check ∧ add_regression_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: grace24h_fix
C: overdue_charge_loop ∧ rule("402") ∧ grace("24h") ∧ boundary_retrigger
P: encode_grace_window ∧ compare_last_charge_ts ∧ suppress_within_24h
V: edge(23h59m_no_402) ∧ edge(24h01m_402) ∧ no_loop
A: add_grace_check ∧ add_regression_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: grace24h_fix.
Constraints: overdue_charge_loop and rule("402") and grace("24h") and boundary_retrigger.
Plan: encode_grace_window and compare_last_charge_ts and suppress_within_24h.
Verify: edge(23h59m_no_402) and edge(24h01m_402) and no_loop.
Answer target: add_grace_check and add_regression_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
